understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete all levels of the KA59 puzzle game by placing every selectable piece onto a goal tile simultaneously. Each level could contain multiple selectable pieces and multiple goal tiles, and a level was won only when all goals were occupied at the same time.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shifted the currently selected piece in pixel-based coordinates (3 pixels per cell). Walls blocked movement, and some objects were pushable, shifting along with the selected piece when moved into. CLICK actions allowed switching control to other selectable pieces by specifying their exact pixel position. The game provided semantic grid hints and heuristic movement-blocked indicators, but actual behavior sometimes differed, requiring experimentation. A finite step budget per level constrained the number of actions.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete all levels of the KA59 puzzle game by placing every selectable piece onto a goal tile simultaneously. Each level could contain multiple selectable pieces and multiple goal tiles, and a level was won only when all goals were occupied at the same time.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shifted the currently selected piece in pixel-based coordinates (3 pixels per cell). Walls blocked movement, and some objects were pushable, shifting along with the selected piece when moved into. CLICK actions allowed switching control to other selectable pieces by specifying their exact pixel position. The game provided semantic grid hints and heuristic movement-blocked indicators, but actual behavior sometimes differed, requiring experimentation. A finite step budget per level constrained the number of actions.
